title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
subTitle: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

title: USA Weekly News
subTitle: The host presents the latest social and economic news stories about the Malayali diaspora in the USA, along with updates on various cultural events and interviews.

title: Veeram
subTitle: Two brothers, raised by their sister, take opposite path, one honest, the other criminal. When tragedy strikes and the criminal brother dies, the honest one seeks vengeance.

title: Comali
subTitle: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Aswathama
subTitle: A man returns to India for his sister's engagement ceremony but discovers that something terrible has happened to her. On his quest for the truth, he uncovers a series of crimes against women.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
subTitle: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfil a promise to his dying mother. His quest takes him to Mumbai, where he gets involved with the notorious gold mafia.

title: Investigator
subTitle: Investigator

title: Surya's Saturday
subTitle: A vigilante fights against injustice using his own unique moral code, where he only comes out to play on Saturdays.

title: Nadodikkattu
subTitle: After losing their jobs, Dasan and Vijayan decide to go to Dubai to try their luck. But they end up in a different location, where they are mistaken for crime investigation officers.

title: Chiriyo Chiri

title: Veerame Vaagai Soodum
subTitle: Porus, a strong-minded IPS aspirant from a middle-class family in Chennai, comes across a series of dark secrets while investigating his sister's murder.

title: Siruthai
subTitle: Rocket Raja, a small-time thief, comes across a young girl who calls him father. However, when Raja finds the truth about the girl's past, he turns into a vigilante.

title: Kadha Parayumbol
subTitle: Balan, a barber, struggles to give his family a better living. However, his life changes when his old friend, who is a film star, comes to his village for a film shoot.

title: Super Pacifier
subTitle: Due to a small mistake from Zhou Yong's part, the entire special ops team was defeated. To comfort his guilt, he takes the responsibility of the deceased's children.

title: Kalinga
subTitle: A nonchalant man defies all rules and crosses his village's boundary. As he tries to obtain the treasure hidden in the Kingdom of Kalinga, he encounters eerie occurrences.

title: Vedhalam
subTitle: Ganesh, a taxi driver, leads a peaceful life. One day, upon helping the police seize three criminals, he incurs the wrath of a criminal network, following which his real identity is revealed.

title: Arjun S/O Vyjayanthi
subTitle: Arjun, a gangster, learns that a terrorist wants to take revenge from his mother, who is an IPS officer. In order to protect her, he strives to overcome all the odds.

title: Ratsasan
subTitle: Following his father's death, a man gives up on his dream to become a film-maker and joins the police force. He then attempts to track down a psychopathic killer who targets schoolgirls.

title: Janaki Nayakan
subTitle: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.

title: Ultimate Justice
subTitle: Retired special operations soldiers are called back into action when their former commander's daughter is kidnapped by an unknown organisation.

title: Kathakali
subTitle: Amudhavel, a simpleton, gets embroiled in the murder of Thamba, a local gangster. The police think that he is the culprit as he had a conflict with him in the past.

title: Amma Ammaayiyamma
subTitle: Prabhavathy, one of five children, marries a rich businessman, Shekharankutty, and forgets about her family. Her husband decides to make her understand the importance of her family.
